recipe.title: Spiced parsnip soup
recipe.description: A beautiful vegetarian parsnip soup recipe from Jamie Oliver. This soup is packed with sweet parsnips, warm spices and topped with crispy parsnip chips.

steps.instructions: Put 2 parsnips aside for later. Peel the onion, roughly chop with the remaining parsnips (keep the skins on) and peel and finely grate the garlic and ginger.

on_enter.say: Put 2 parsnips aside for later. Peel the onion, roughly chop with the remaining parsnips (keep the skins on) and peel and finely grate the garlic and ginger.

steps.descr: Place the parsnips and onions in a large pan over a...
steps.instructions: Place the parsnips and onions in a large pan over a medium heat with 1 tablespoon of olive oil, then cover and cook for 20 minutes, or until dark golden, stirring occasionally.

on_enter.say: Place the parsnips and onions in a large pan over a medium heat with 1 tablespoon of olive oil, then cover and cook for 20 minutes, or until dark golden, stirring occasionally.

steps.descr: Add the garlic and ginger, then scatter over the cumin...
steps.instructions: Add the garlic and ginger, then scatter over the cumin seeds, 1 teaspoon of garam masala and the lentils and cook for a further 5 minutes.

on_enter.say: Add the garlic and ginger, then scatter over the cumin seeds, 1 teaspoon of garam masala and the lentils and cook for a further 5 minutes.

steps.descr: Roughly snap in the uncooked poppadoms, then add the...
steps.instructions: Roughly snap in the uncooked poppadoms, then add the stock and simmer for 20 minutes, loosening with a splash of water, if needed.

on_enter.say: Roughly snap in the uncooked poppadoms, then add the stock and simmer for 20 minutes, loosening with a splash of water, if needed.

steps.descr: Meanwhile, speed-peel the reserved parsnips into ribbons...
steps.instructions: Meanwhile, speed-peel the reserved parsnips into ribbons until you reach the woody core (discard this bit), blanch for 30 seconds in fast boiling water, then drain and pat dry.

on_enter.say: Meanwhile, speed-peel the reserved parsnips into ribbons until you reach the woody core (discard this bit), blanch for 30 seconds in fast boiling water, then drain and pat dry.

steps.descr: Season with sea salt, then spread out in a single layer...
steps.instructions: Season with sea salt, then spread out in a single layer over a couple of oiled baking trays. Roast for 15 minutes, or until golden and crisp.

on_enter.say: Season with sea salt, then spread out in a single layer over a couple of oiled baking trays. Roast for 15 minutes, or until golden and crisp.

steps.descr: Season the soup to perfection, ripple through the...
steps.instructions: Season the soup to perfection, ripple through the yoghurt and divide between warm bowls.

on_enter.say: Season the soup to perfection, ripple through the yoghurt and divide between warm bowls.

steps.descr: Pick over the coriander leaves, sprinkle with a little...
steps.instructions: Pick over the coriander leaves, sprinkle with a little garam masala, and top with the parsnip crisps. Feel free to drizzle with chilli oil for a warm glow.

on_enter.say: Pick over the coriander leaves, sprinkle with a little garam masala, and top with the parsnip crisps. Feel free to drizzle with chilli oil for a warm glow.
